/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/game_state.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/pudge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/hook.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/console-wars.dir/src/input.cpp.o" -o console-wars
